TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit SKGLControl extends OpenTK.GLControl

Docs.summary: A hardware-accelerated control that can be drawn on using SkiaSharp drawing commands.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class OpenTK.Graphics.GraphicsMode mode) cil managed

Docs.param: The specifying pixel format attributes for the GL context.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified graphics mode.

MemberSignature.Value: public SKGLControl (OpenTK.Graphics.GraphicsMode mode, int major, int minor, OpenTK.Graphics.GraphicsContextFlags flags);

.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class OpenTK.Graphics.GraphicsMode mode, int32 major, int32 minor, valuetype OpenTK.Graphics.GraphicsContextFlags flags) cil managed

Docs.param: The specifying pixel format attributes for the GL context.
The major version number of the OpenGL context to create.
The minor version number of the OpenGL context to create.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified graphics mode and context version.

Docs.value: The current size of the canvas.
Docs.remarks: The canvas size may be different to the view size as a result of the current device's pixel density.

MemberSignature.Value: .method familyhidebysig virtual instance void Dispose(bool disposing) cil managed

Docs.param: to release both managed and unmanaged resources; to release only unmanaged resources.
Docs.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the and optionally releases the managed resources.
Docs.remarks: Always dispose the object before you release your last reference to the . Otherwise, the resources it is using will not be freed until the garbage collector calls the finalizer.

MemberSignature.Value: .method familyhidebysig virtual instance void OnPaint(class System.Windows.Forms.PaintEventArgs e) cil managed

Docs.param: A PaintEventArgs that contains the event data.

MemberSignature.Value: .method familyhidebysig newslot virtual instance void OnPaintSurface(class SkiaSharp.Views.Desktop.SKPaintGLSurfaceEventArgs e) cil managed

Docs.param: The event arguments that contain the drawing surface and information.
Docs.summary: Implement this to draw on the canvas.
Occurs when the surface needs to be redrawn.
